features: For A Fun Night of Games - These plastic playing cards are perfect for a night of traditional card games or poker. Bond with friends, family and loved ones. Make memories whilst on holiday, and get competitive when your all together.
Durable and Lightweight - Our plastic playing cards are coated for durability and water resistance. This deck of cards are in the classic traditional style you know and love.

Perfect for Poker - These premium playing cards are designed to enable players to hold their cards close together with one hand. Keep one eye on your eye on your cards, and the other on your opponents.

Amazing Value, Endless Possibilities - This 2pk of playing cards represents great value, and will create life long memories. Use them down the pub, host poker nights, play drinking games, practice your magic skills, get all the family playing together... the possibilities are endless.
Whats Included? - 2pk of Playing Cards. Deck of Cards: 52 total, 4 suits of 13 each. Clubs and Spades are black; Hearts and Diamonds are red. Jack, Queen and King are face cards.
